title: Mister Merryman.
content:
He's always standing on his toes,
        And never on his heels;
    He's always holding up his arms--
        I wonder how it feels.

    Two balls are always in his hands,
        He never lets them drop;
    He's always smiling just like this,
        And never seems to stop.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Richard Hunter, titled "Mister Merryman.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
